vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages

triage_decision.reason: Adjusting the permissions of /var/log/messages to 0600 is a straightforward filesystem permission change that does not impact authentication, networking, or boot processes. It aligns with the STIG recommendation and poses minimal risk of system disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Restricts log file access to root only, which may affect non‑root troubleshooting
